Attend Perran's SEND meetings

Register to attend one of Perran’s two SEND meetings to discuss the SEND White Paper consultation. The meetings are 10-11am on 14/04 and 28/04. Please subject your email “SEND meeting” and the date of the meeting you wish to attend.

Register now

Meet with Perran

Book a place at Perran’s next constituency surgery to discuss any issues you may have.

Book a place
